tmp_path.unlink()
            raise

    upsampler = RealESRGANer(
        scale=2,
        model_path=str(model_path),
        model=model,
        tile=0,
        pre_pad=0,
        half=True,
    )
    _REALESRGAN_SR = upsampler
    return upsampler
def clear_realesrgan_sr() -> None:
    """Release the Real-ESRGAN upsampler to free VRAM."""
    global _REALESRGAN_SR
    _REALESRGAN_SR = None
